data.command: && npm run lint && npm run test
&& npm run lint && npm run build
&& rm -rf src dist tests node_modules package-lock.json
&& npx kill-port 5173 5174 2>/dev/null; sleep 1 && npm run dev &
&& mkdir -p src/core/parser src/core/generator src/core/validator src/features/command-editor src/features/command-blocks src/features/datapack src/utils
&& npx kill-port 5173 5174 2>/dev/null; sleep 1 && npm run dev &

<< 'ASTEOF'
/**
 * Minecraft 命令 AST 数据结构
 */

// 基础类型
export type SelectorType = '@p' | '@a' | '@e' | '@r' | '@s'
export type Coordin
cd O:/TC_P1 && npx tsc --noEmit --project tsconfig.json 2>&1 | head -50
cd O:/TC_P1 && npx tsc --noEmit --project tsconfig.json 2>&1 | grep -i
cd O:/TC_P1 && npm run build 2>&1 | head -20
cd O:/TC_P1 && rm -rf dist && npm run build 2>&1
cd O:/TC_P1 && npm run build 2>&1 | head -100
cd O:/TC_P1 && npm run build 2>&1 | head -100
